response.title: Digital Learning Experience Designer
response.description: Innovative Learning Solutions is seeking a creative and tech-savvy Digital Learning Experience Designer to join our dynamic team. This entry-level position is ideal for individuals looking to blend educational content development with user experience design. You will collaborate with educators and tech specialists to create engaging, interactive online learning modules that enhance student engagement and learning outcomes.

required_skills: Basic proficiency in Learning Management Systems (LMS) such as Moodle or Canvas
Understanding of instructional design principles (ADDIE model, Bloom's Taxonomy)
Familiarity with eLearning authoring tools like Articulate Storyline or Adobe Captivate
Basic graphic design skills using tools like Canva or Adobe Creative Suite
Strong written communication skills for creating clear and concise content
Ability to conduct user testing and gather feedback effectively
Understanding of accessibility standards (WCAG) in digital content
Data analysis skills to assess learner engagement metrics
preferred_skills: Familiarity with HTML/CSS for minor content adjustments
Experience with video editing software such as Camtasia or Adobe Premiere Pro
Knowledge of gamification techniques in education
Basic project management skills using tools like Trello or Asana
requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Educational Technology, Instructional Design, or a related field
